# zendesk_macro (Resource)

Manages a Zendesk macro.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `actions` (Attributes List) Actions the macro performs on tickets. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--actions))
- `title` (String) The title of the macro.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the macro is active.
- `description` (String) The description of the macro.
- `restriction` (Attributes) Who may access this macro. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--restriction))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `default` (Boolean) Whether this is a default system macro.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `position` (Number) The position of the macro.
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--actions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `actions`

Required:

- `field` (String) The ticket field to modify.
- `value` (String) The new value for the field.


<a id="nestedatt--restriction"></a>
### Nested Schema for `restriction`

Required:

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the group or user.
- `type` (String) The type of restriction (Group or User).
